name: Espnow → Send
description: This is an [Action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) for sending a data packet over the ESP-NOW protocol to a specific peer.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The data to be sent. The maximum payload size is 250 bytes.

config_entries.label: Continue On Error
config_entries.description: If set to `false`, the surrounding automation will be aborted if the send fails. Cannot be `false` when `wait_for_sent` is `false`. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Wait For Sent
config_entries.description: If `true`, the automation will wait for the underlying send operation to complete (and for any `on_sent` or `on_error` actions to finish) before continuing with the next action. Defaults to `true`.
